free_text: New excitation functions for proton induced reactions
on natural titanium, nickel and copper up to 70 MeV.
Each thin foil was weighed before irradiation the
thickness was deduced- around 20 mum for the titanium
and copper foils and 25 lm for the nickel foils. All
foils were with high isotopic and chemical purity-99.6%
for titanium, 99% for nickel and 99.9% for copper.
Their isotopic composition is reported is-
